robSynth 0.5.0

Generate synthetic continuous values from a robust fit

Source: R/robust_conditional.R
generate_robust_continuous.Rd

Draws from the fitted robust model with added residual noise. Supports both direct drawing (normal residuals) and predictive mean matching (PMM).

Usage

generate_robust_continuous(
  fit,
  X_new,
  uncertainty = c("normal", "pmm"),
  donors = 5L
)

Arguments

fit

object of class "robsynth_fit_cont" as returned by fit_robust_continuous

X_new

data.frame of predictors (from synthetic data)

uncertainty

how to introduce synthesis noise: "normal" (default) adds \(N(0, \hat\sigma^2)\); "pmm" uses predictive mean matching.

donors

number of PMM donors. Default: 5.

Value

numeric vector of synthetic values

Author

Matthias Templ

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
data(CrohnD, package = "robustbase")
fit <- fit_robust_continuous(CrohnD$BMI,
                             CrohnD[, c("age", "height"), drop = FALSE])
y_new <- generate_robust_continuous(fit,
                             CrohnD[, c("age", "height"), drop = FALSE])
} # }
